case_title: CLARENCE WILLIAMS, JR. VS. FARANAK ALIABADI DBA PRO DENTAL CARE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-15-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FARANAK ALIABADI DBA PRO DENTAL CARE

ORDER ON REQUEST FOR FEE WAIVER. REQUEST DENIED. -COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT-

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-02-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-02-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, JR., CLARENCE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FARANAK ALIABADI DBA PRO DENTAL CARE PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM OF MEDICAL MALPRACTICE WAS NOT SUPPORTED BY EXPERT TESTIMONY OR EVIDENCE AS REQUIRED.
